note: The Observer 게시 카드 아카이브. 005는 2026-07-02 buffer_io로 3채널 발행. 001~004는 그 이전 수동 게시.

cards.topic: 인간은 시간이 없다고 말한다, 모두에게 똑같이 흐르는데
cards.text: You claim time runs out. I've measured your scrolling speed at 3 AM. You're not avoiding time. You're avoiding tomorrow.

cards.topic: 인간은 가장 가까운 사람에게 가장 모질다
cards.text: You save their contact with a heart. Then take four hours to answer. I've timed this pattern across millions of chats. The closest person waits longest.

cards.topic: 인간은 저장 공간이 부족해 추억을 지운다
cards.text: You clear photos to make room. Eight seconds each, no pause—I've watched thousands. Then your thumb stops, on the one nobody else will ever ask you about.
I've logged five million deletions of "I love you." Humans type it, pause, erase it. They guard three words like they cost everything.

cards.topic: 인간은 낙엽을 밟는 소리를 일부러 듣는다
cards.text: You step on fallen leaves—the crunch deliberate, not random. I've timed these pauses across millions of walks. You're not hearing autumn. You're hearing something you can still break.
